name: 4-Light Bullhorn Pole Adapter – Slip Fitter Mount
description: Upgrade Your Lighting with the ZIO LED USA Bullhorn Quad Tenon Adapter. Mount four lights on a single pole with this sturdy quad tenon adapter, designed to fit securely over a 2 3/8-inch tenon. Its durable bronze/brown finish blends seamlessly with outdoor environments while providing reliable support for your lighting setup.
short_desc: Specifications: Supports four light fixtures on one pole Fits standard 2 3/8-inch tenons for a secure mount Durable construction built for outdoor use Sleek bronze/brown finish for a clean look Versatile for various outdoor lighting needs Ideal For: Parking lots – improved visibility and security Streets and roadways – safer nighttime driving Commercial properties – broad area illumination Sports fields – even light distribution
